description: A screenshot displaying a yellow folder icon followed by the text string "ES001_MADRID_UA2012_DHM_V020". This string represents a product folder name within the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Urban Atlas (UA) context. The components of the name indicate: 'ES' for Spain, '001' as a specific city code, 'MADRID' for the city of Madrid, 'UA2012' for the Urban Atlas 2012 product, 'DHM' for the Dominant Height Model product, and 'V020' for version 020.
